source.name: Ant Design
source.license_notes: Use source links and summarized guidance only; do not copy full documentation verbatim.

layout_rules: Use tables for structured rows and columns with management actions.
Expose sorting, filtering, pagination, selection, expansion, and custom empty states when the data task needs them.
Keep actions predictable and close to the row or toolbar scope they affect.
accessibility_notes: Preserve semantic table structure when customizing cells.
Do not hide important actions behind hover-only behavior for keyboard users.
implementation_hints: Use as a strong default for React enterprise admin pages in Chinese product contexts.
Prefer Ant table when speed and convention matter more than bespoke visual branding.

quality.notes: Official Ant Design Table component summarized.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Ant Design Table for dense enterprise CRUD/admin data: pagination, sorting, filtering, selection, expansion, fixed columns, loading and empty states.
